inputs.label: Atmospheric Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Standard atmospheric pressure at sea level.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard atmospheric pressure at sea level.

inputs.label: Vapor Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Vapor pressure of the fluid at pumping temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vapor pressure of the fluid at pumping temperature.

inputs.label: Liquid Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the fluid being pumped.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the fluid being pumped.

inputs.label: Static Suction Head
inputs.businessContext: Height from fluid surface to pump centerline. Positive if fluid above pump, negative for suction lift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height from fluid surface to pump centerline. Positive if fluid above pump, negative for suction lift.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıvı yüzeyinden pompa merkezine olan yükseklik. Sıvı pompanın üzerindeyse pozitif, emme yüksekliği için negatif.

inputs.label: Friction Head Loss
inputs.businessContext: Friction losses in suction piping, including fittings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Friction losses in suction piping, including fittings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emme boru hattındaki bağlantı parçaları dahil sürtünme kayıpları.

inputs.label: Velocity Head
inputs.businessContext: Velocity head at pump suction, typically v²/(2g).

businessContext_i18n.en: Velocity head at pump suction, typically v²/(2g).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompa emişindeki hız yüksekliği, tipik olarak v²/(2g).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
